title: corn craft
description: Corn Craft is my (JimmyDeng) debut work. This mod can add many useful crops to Minecraft, and it is in the experimental period. If there are any shortcomings, please forgive me.
body: Do you think Minecraft is missing something? That's right! It's corn! This mod adds corn and related items, which can give everyone a little help, such as giving saturation buffs, enhancements, etc., players can experience the fun of playing this mod!This mod provides things similar to the original items, such as corn swords, and so on. Don't forget the set, the corn cover can give players a saturation buff, so you no longer worry about not having anything to eat. Afterwards, we will continue to update, including corn guns.It will also add some machine.Stay tuned.
